description: GET /api/v1/events returns an empty events array when the DB has no events
Events that have not been geocoded (location_id = null) are excluded from the response
note: Only events with a linked Location row (geocoded) appear in the API response

description: Multiple un-geocoded events are all excluded — the response remains an empty array
Even with an empty DB, the response wrapper { data: { events: [...] } } is always present
